source_pr.title: planner/core: make TIDB_INLJ to specify the inner table

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_INLJ(t1) */ * from t join t1 on t.a=t1.a order by t.b").Check(testkit.Rows("3 1 3 4", "1 3 1 2", "1 3 1 3")) (executor/join_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_INLJ(t1) */ * from t join t1 on t.a=t1.a order by t.b").Check(testkit.Rows("3 1 3 4", "1 3 1 2", "1 3 1 3")) (executor/join_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_INLJ(t1) */ * from t join t1 on t.a=t1.a order by t.b").Check(testkit.Rows("3 1 3 4", "1 3 1 2", "1 3 1 3")) (executor/join_test.go)

files: executor/index_lookup_join_test.go, executor/join_test.go, planner/core/exhaust_physical_plans.go, planner/core/logical_plan_builder.go, planner/core/logical_plans.go, planner/core/physical_plan_test.go
